title: Coverage missing lines that were definitely hit
body: I am encountering an issue where I generate a coverage report on a simple finite state machine file. I have a simple test bench with some simple tests. I'm running on Mac Sonoma 14.6, verilator version: Verilator 5.028 2024-08-21 rev UNKNOWN.REV I'm not sure about the git master version, I installed it from brew, im assuming that is main. I have checked the wave forms and the expected signals are going off. However, the entire fsm logic is getting 0 hits, and showing poor code coverage. Upon adding a single display statement in the fsm code block, all of a sudden the coverage report starts making sense and showing that the right lines are being hit. I'm reporting this as a bug, because it seems like it is, but please let me know if there is something that is being overlooked here.
